summary: Iteration 3 — both backend & frontend tested. All 28 pytest tests pass (admin JWT, spots write protection, site-config public/admin, translations cache, partners, seal, inquiries). Frontend mobile UI verified end-to-end: language switcher (PT/EN/ES), Accessibility FAB + panel (all 4 toggles, persistence), admin gate redirect, admin login + dashboard with 14 spots + quick actions + logout, /admin/site form, marketplace (6 partners), partner detail + inquiry submit + success card, seal verify (valid & invalid). Backend logs confirm inquiry persistence. No critical issues. Minor inconsistency: /menu uses different testIDs (toggle-audio, toggle-haptics) than the floating panel (toggle-audio-focus, toggle-haptic) — same underlying state, so functionally synced, but testID naming is inconsistent.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated by react-native-web — should migrate to 'boxShadow'. Non-blocking but appears on every screen with FAB/panel/cards.

react_native_issues.issue: Inconsistent testID naming between /menu and floating Accessibility Panel. menu.tsx uses 'toggle-audio' / 'toggle-haptics'; AccessibilityPanel uses 'toggle-audio-focus' / 'toggle-haptic'. Underlying state is the same so they ARE synced functionally, but tests targeting one screen won't match the other. Reference: /app/frontend/app/menu.tsx:111,127 vs /app/frontend/src/components/AccessibilityPanel.tsx:61,77

action_items: (Optional) Align menu.tsx testIDs to match AccessibilityPanel (toggle-audio-focus, toggle-haptic) so a single test ID set works on both surfaces.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow on web to remove console warnings.
No retest required — all critical flows green.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: admin endpoints correctly require Bearer JWT; password_hash never returned in /api/admin/me payload (verified by test_admin_me_with_valid_token).
Frontend: /admin route correctly gated — unauthenticated navigation redirects to /admin/login as expected.
Frontend: window.confirm is used for delete on web (correctly, since Alert.alert doesn't work on web).
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ inquiry created via UI flow (TEST_UI_User → Pousada Inclusiva Ponta Negra). Backend tests also created/cleaned TEST_ spots via admin token. Persisted inquiry id logged in backend (61cf61bf-...). Safe to leave or sweep with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend admin JWT flow is stable. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var (https://tourism-audio-guide.preview.emergentagent.com) when running pytest. Admin creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (admin@turismoquesesente.com.br / Natal@2026!). For frontend, /partner/{id} inquiry form is hidden behind 'Reservar' CTA — click testID='reserve-button' first, then fill testIDs field-name/field-email/field-message and click submit-inquiry-button. Seal codes are 10-char hex strings; first partner seal code can be fetched via GET /api/partners.
rca_of_issue: No bugs reproduced. The only finding is the cosmetic testID inconsistency between /menu and the floating Accessibility Panel — they share the same a11y store keys so toggling one IS reflected in the other on next open (verified via reload test on home → panel still showed audio-focus ON after reload).
